close_reason: Fixed: same doc covers write side
description: Same issue as NV read: nv_write is called with a single MaxNvBuffer. If the secret value exceeds MAX_NV_BUFFER_SIZE (TPM-implementation-specific, typically 1024-2048 bytes), the write will fail with an opaque TPM error. The tss-esapi abstraction has nv::write_all() for chunked writes. Either use it or document the limit. This is the write-side twin of the read issue.
title: NV write single-shot; same MAX_NV_BUFFER_SIZE limit
